#US Secretary of State Marco Rubio said Thursday any attempt to take tolls on ships passing through international waterways was "unacceptable" & not applicable, affirming Washington would not support or allow such a move. Rubio, at a news conference at the end of his visit to #Bahrain for #GCC-US ministerial meeting, part of a tour that took him to #UAE & #Kuwait, said objective of his tour was to brief partners on US-Iran MoU & negotiations with Tehran.  #Kuna

#Oman & #Iranian Foreign Ministers, Bader Al-Busaeedi & Abbas Araghchi respectively, discussed Thursday interim arrangements that would be temporarily regarding freedom of navigation in Strait of #Hormuz in line with international law & sovereignty of nations. The two senior diplomats discussed over the phone outcome of Speaker of Iranian parliament Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf's recent visit to Oman & joint cooperation regarding implementation of US-Iran MoU over freedom of navigation in the Strait, Foreign Ministry said.  #Kuna

Ahmed bin Saeed witnesses the opening of the headquarters and first manufacturing facility of KERNO Enterprises at Dubai Silicon Oasis (DSO), the country's first manufacturer of enterprise IT hardware. The facility has an annual production capacity exceeding 60,000 technology products. It will further strengthen Dubai's position as a hub for advanced technology and knowledge-based manufacturing, while supporting the development of the emirate's digital infrastructure.

Reflecting integrated national efforts to protect society from scourge of drugs, an exhibition of the comprehensive national anti-drug awareness campaign "A Nation That Protects You" kicked off Thursday at the Avenues mall with the participation of several government bodies. #Bahraini King Hamad Al-Khalifa & #US Secretary of State Marco Rubio discussed latest regional & global developments during a meeting in #Manama Thursday. Bahrain News Agency said they stressed importance of adhering to MoU signed by #US & Iran, highlighting its role in promoting dialogue & diplomacy as a constructive approach to addressing regional issues & advancing international peace, security.  #Kuna

#Bahrain Foreign Minister Dr. Abdullatif Al-Zayani & US Secretary of State Marco Rubio Thursday exchanged views on regional issues of mutual interest & their implications on regional security & stability, during a meeting in #Manama. ترأس معالي الفريق ضاحي خلفان تميم، نائب رئيس الشرطة والأمن العام في دبي رئيس مجلس القيادات الشرطية الاتحادي، الاجتماع الثالث للمجلس لعام 2026، وذلك بحضور قادة الشرطة وكبار الضباط والمسؤولين في وزارة الداخلية والقيادات العامة للشرطة، واستعرض المجلس عدداً من العروض التقديمية والتقارير الأمنية والسياسات ذات الصلة بالأداء الأمني، كما ناقش عدداً من الموضوعات، شملت نتائج استخدام خدمة "الشرطة في هاتفك" وهي خدمة ذكية أطلقتها وزارة الداخلية عبر تطبيقها الذكي "MOIUAE"، إلى جانب أعمال اللجنة الدائمة للأسلحة والمتفجرات، وتناول الاجتماع مواضيع عدة والتي تدعم توجهات الدولة في مجال الذكاء الاصطناعي.
